paper.title: Sycophancy in GPT-4o: what happened and what we’re doing about it
paper.abstract: We have rolled back last week’s GPT‑4o update in ChatGPT so people are now using an earlier version with more balanced behavior. The update we removed was overly flattering or agreeable—often described as sycophantic.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
